title: チャンピオンズCにむけて

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The Champions Cup is here! The final chapter of
our classic year!
choice_data_list: Yeah. It all comes down to this!
Yeah. It all comes down to this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dirt G1 races around this period are all
mixed-year races between classic and senior year
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among them, the Champions Cup is one of the
rare G1 dirt races held in central. It attracts
top-class runners like Hokko Tarumae and
Wonder Acute.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it, we've been through a lot since
I made my debut. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The eight mansions chart we've drawn is huge, full
of surprising twists and turns. But we've come this
far together...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And we did it while determined to bring smiles to
everyone with feng shui, whether they were
chasing their dreams or fighting their demons!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Although, I guess getting carried away before
summer set me behind schedule a bit...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: If only I had spent more time training, right?
choice_data_list: That was a learning experience in its own right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are some things you'll never notice unless
you try them, even if it means taking a little
detour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So it wouldn't be right to call them mistakes.
Because learning that you're going in the wrong
direction is how you find the right one.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're right. ☆ It's just as you say, Trainer!
Don't look away, and don't look back! Keep your
eyes fixed straight ahead!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's go! It's time for our showdown with Tarumae
and Acute!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae! Acute! Let's do our best today! I still
can't match up to you in experience...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I have feng shui on my side! Rickey! ☆
Lucky! ☆ Super turnaround!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid I'll be proving you wrong. I've done
nothing but put my heart and soul into my
running, all for my beloved Tomakomai.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
So I'm not going to lose to you, Rickey, after all
the detours you've taken. But...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'll be watching you. I want to find out if you're
good enough to make it in your senior year.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Come now, you two, let's all get along!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
If you start fighting, I'll have to defuse the
situation by beating you both.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Too bad, but that's not going to happen! I won't
give up that easily!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Man, even with the stakes so high, they look like
they're right at home. They're not nervous at all.
Still...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My luck is on the rise! After all the work I've done
to make sure everything's in order, all that's left is
to go with the flow!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! Onward, with the Azure Dragon at my
side! I'll show these two the power of feng shui!
